content.text:
[cron:74870ca0-3164-4c7a-ac43-02cac1b4034e Godot下载监控] 检查 Godot 下载状态。如果未安装成功，继续尝试下载 Godot 4.x Linux 版本。使用 wget 或 curl 从官网或镜像下载，每10分钟重试直到成功。下载成功后解压到 /tmp/ 并验证可执行。
Current time: Sunday, March 1st, 2026 — 5:39 PM (Asia/Shanghai)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

arguments.command: which godot || ls -la /tmp/godot* 2>/dev/null || echo "Godot not found in PATH or /tmp"

content.text: -rw-r--r-- 1 root root 16659840 Mar  1 17:35 /tmp/godot.zip

{
  "status": "error",
  "tool": "exec",
  "error": "Archive:  godot.zip
  End-of-central-directory signature not found.  Either this file is not
  a zipfile, or it constitutes one disk of a multi-part archive.  In the
  latter case the central directory and zipfile comment will be found on
  the last disk(s) of this archive.
unzip:  cannot find zipfile directory in one of godot.zip or
        godot.zip.zip, and cannot find godot.zip.ZIP, period.

Command exited with code 9"
}
